data.name: Netoria Tactics: Revolution Gold
data.detailed_description:
An erotic SRPG where combat and gameplay shape the narrative. The protagonists are a male fighter and his love interest- but other members of your party will try to grope the pair, seducing them over to their side. With proper positioning this can be avoided, but you'll be at a major disadvantage in the battles. Will you use all the abilities at your disposal to crush your enemies, or will you hold back to try and protect the fragile love of our heroes?

Carwyn has been condemned to an almost certain death and his only hope of survival is a set of trials fraught with danger. He is joined by the love of his life, Gwenivier, as the two descend into a cavern from which no-one has ever returned. They will encounter obstacles and opponents that will push their relationship to its breaking point. Will true love prevail?

Cuckolding scenarios involve three different men trying to win Gwenivier's affections, a female rival for Gwenivier obsessed with Carwyn, and a male to female transformation for Carwyn leading to him becoming the groups play thing.

Netoria Tactics: Revolution Gold features new art, additional story events, and special items not found in the original release- with plans for even more content on the horizon.

  • VOYEUR MODE: Hide cuckold scenes so that you are only aware through hints.

  • MECHANICS DRIVEN: Your choices in combat affect Gwenivier's loyalty to you.

  • GENDER BENDING: Carwyn can be feminized based on the player's actions.

  • GOLDEN PATH: There is a "perfect" route and ending, if you're skilled enough.

  • GUEST ART: A number of new, non-canon, scenes and artworks by various artists.

data.short_description: In this erotic SRPG, how you play the battles determines if the the love of our heroes blossoms or if they're torn apart. Love, loss, and gender-bending await our heroes in the dark.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® Vista(sp2) / 7 / 8 / 10 (32bit/64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Pentium® 4 2.0 GHz equivalent or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1024 x 768 pixels or higher desktop resolution
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
